description: Andrea Baglioni introduces Breakpoint 2022 at Convento Dobeato, highlighting its historical significance and the agenda focused on NFT royalties and legal discussions.
topic_summary: Introduction to Breakpoint 2022 at Convento Dobeato, discussing the venue's history [t=28:87], the packed agenda including NFT royalties [t=57:75], and the involvement of legal experts [t=72:55].
